lemon_market_new_listings.description: The car is in poor condition. The exterior has significant rust and body damage. The interior shows heavy wear, including tears in the upholstery and staining. Several mechanical systems require repair and maintenance.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been consistently well-maintained over the years. The exterior paint remains vibrant, though there are a few minor door dings and some light surface scratches that are typical for a car of this age. Mechanically, it runs smoothly and has a solid service history. Inside, the cabin is clean and comfortable, showing only light wear on the upholstery. It’s a reliable car that is ready for its next owner.

Bring your tools and your vision! This vehicle is a fantastic opportunity for someone looking for a project or a reliable source for parts. While it has significant wear and currently needs some mechanical attention and bodywork, it’s an affordable entry point for a dedicated DIYer ready to give it a second life!
This vehicle is in good condition. It shows minor signs of regular wear but has been well-maintained. All major mechanical systems are functional and the car is reliable for daily use.
Good condition.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is for parts or a major restoration project. Mechanically, the transmission is slipping significantly and the engine has several active oil leaks. It also requires immediate attention to the braking system and suspension, as it is currently unsafe to drive on the highway. Cosmetically, there is visible rust on the rocker panels and wheel wells, and the interior upholstery is heavily worn with several tears in the seats. The air conditioning is non-functional and the electrical system has intermittent issues. This car will likely need to be towed and is recommended only for those with the mechanical expertise to perform extensive repairs.

Presenting a vehicle of superlative caliber, maintained to an impeccable standard that rivals its original showroom state. This specimen exhibits flawless aesthetic integrity and peak mechanical performance, representing a rare acquisition for the discerning driver. Every detail has been preserved with meticulous care, ensuring an ownership experience characterized by distinction and absolute reliability. We invite you to inspect this benchmark of automotive excellence.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my absolute pride and joy. This car is in incredible shape—honestly, it looks and smells like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It's been pampered, garage-kept, and is looking for a new home where it'll be just as loved. You seriously won't find another one this clean. Come take a look, you’re going to love it!

Offering a collector-grade E92 M3, featuring the legendary S65 naturally aspirated V8 with individual throttle bodies and an 8,400 RPM redline. This example is mechanically pristine, delivering linear power through a precise 6-speed manual gearbox to a variable M-differential lock. The chassis remains tight and responsive, equipped with Electronic Damper Control (EDC) and original multi-link suspension geometry. Meticulously maintained with documented rod bearing service and a flawless subframe inspection. The factory Alpine White paint retains its deep luster, and the Novillo leather interior shows zero bolster wear or UV degradation. A turn-key masterpiece for the technical purist seeking peak BMW M-division engineering.
Mint condition. Garage kept. No mechanical issues. Clean title. Inspection ready.

This vehicle is an absolute time capsule, maintained to a standard rarely seen outside of a museum. The exterior finish retains its deep, factory luster with zero imperfections, dings, or swirl marks, having been exclusively garage-kept and hand-washed. Inside, the cabin remains in showroom condition; the premium leather is supple with no creasing, and every electronic component functions flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, featuring a comprehensive service history and a drive feel that is as tight and responsive as the day it rolled off the lot. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands perfection, this is the one.

Presenting a vehicle of superlative caliber, maintained in impeccable, showroom-original condition. This specimen represents the pinnacle of its class, featuring an unblemished exterior and a cabin that retains its factory-fresh integrity. Meticulously serviced and preserved, it offers an uncompromising driving experience for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection. This is an investment-grade opportunity to acquire a vehicle in truly peerless form.

Presenting an unparalleled opportunity to acquire a vehicle in pristine showroom condition. This specimen has been meticulously curated and maintained to the most exacting standards, exhibiting flawless aesthetic and mechanical integrity. It represents an investment-grade example for the discerning driver who demands absolute perfection and unrivaled performance.

Hey there! You’ve gotta see this beauty—it’s seriously in pristine, showroom condition and looks like it just rolled off the lot! I’ve taken such good care of it, and it drives like an absolute dream. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically brand new without the sticker shock, this is the one for you. Come take it for a spin, you're going to love it!

This E46 M3 is a mechanical masterpiece in concours-level condition. The S54 3.2L inline-six pulls linearly to its 8,000 RPM redline, benefiting from a recent comprehensive VANOS overhaul and precision valve adjustment. Power is delivered through a crisp 6-speed Getrag manual gearbox to a variable M-differential lock. The chassis is rock-solid with documented rear subframe reinforcement and a precision-tuned suspension featuring Bilstein B16 dampers. Every bushing is tight, and the throttle response from the individual throttle bodies is instantaneous. This is a turn-key, investment-grade example for the discerning driver who values engineering purity.
Mint condition. Clean title. Garage kept. No accidents. Service history available.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive preservation. This vehicle is in showroom condition, having been fastidiously maintained in a climate-controlled environment since day one. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero paint chips, scratches, or swirl marks, further protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating that makes the color pop. Inside, the cabin remains pristine; the premium leather seats show no signs of wear or bolster compression, the carpets are spotless, and it retains that distinct new-car aroma. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, with a comprehensive service history performed exclusively by certified technicians. Every button, switch, and feature functions exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. This is not just a used car; it is a collector-grade time capsule for the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection. Includes all original keys, manuals, and a thick folder of maintenance records.

We are pleased to present this impeccably maintained vehicle, preserved in showroom condition. This specimen represents the pinnacle of automotive care, featuring flawless exterior surfaces and an interior that remains indistinguishable from new. Meticulously inspected and prepared for the most discerning collector, it offers an unrivaled driving experience for those who demand excellence without compromise.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, curated for the most discerning of clients. This specimen remains in peerless condition, exhibiting an uncompromising standard of preservation both aesthetically and mechanically. Every detail reflects a history of meticulous care, ensuring a driving experience that mirrors its original factory delivery. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of such distinguished caliber.

Hey there! If you're looking for a ride that looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor, you’ve found it! I’ve taken such absolute pride in keeping this beauty in pristine, mint condition—it’s been pampered since day one. No scratches, no spills, and it drives like a dream. I'm honestly sad to see it go, but I'd love for it to find a great new home where it'll be just as loved. Come take a look, you’re going to fall in love!

This 997.2 Carrera S is a benchmark example of naturally aspirated engineering. The 3.8L DFI flat-six engine provides an exceptionally flat torque curve and surgical throttle response, paired with a tactile 6-speed manual transaxle. The chassis features Porsche Active Suspension Management (PASM) with revised damping rates for superior lateral stability and turn-in precision. Meticulously maintained, the undercarriage shows zero oxidative stress, and the DME report confirms a life free of overrev incidents. With its factory-spec limited-slip differential and flawless synchromesh, this vehicle offers a pure, mechanical connection to the tarmac.
Mint condition. Single owner. Full service history. No accidents. Clean title. Inspections welcome.

This vehicle is a true 'time capsule' find, preserved in showroom-ready condition. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish, protected by a professional ceramic coating with absolutely no paint chips, swirls, or imperfections to be found. Inside, the cabin remains pristine and smoke-free; the premium leather is supple with no bolster wear, and the carpets have been protected by original floor mats since day one. Every technological feature and button functions with factory precision. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, having been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage and serviced exclusively at authorized centers. We have a comprehensive binder of every service record, documenting its pampered history. The engine runs whisper-quiet, and the transmission shifts are imperceptible. This is an exceptional opportunity for a collector or enthusiast to own a flawless example that drives exactly as it did the day it was delivered. Includes two original keys, all factory manuals, and a custom-fit car cover.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit represents a rare opportunity to acquire a machine in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear. Its mechanical integrity and aesthetic preservation serve as a benchmark for the model. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who accepts only the finest, this vehicle stands as a testament to meticulous stewardship.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled preservation. This vehicle reflects a standard of care typically reserved for private collections, exhibiting flawless exterior aesthetics and a pristine interior environment. Mechanically absolute and visually striking, it represents the definitive pinnacle of its class for the discerning enthusiast.

Hey there! I’m so excited to share this absolute beauty with you. Honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It's been totally pampered, kept tucked away in a garage, and there isn't a single scratch or dent to be found. If you're looking for that 'new car' feeling, this is definitely the one! Come take a look—I promise you're going to fall in love with it the moment you see it.

Offered is a concourse-grade 997.1 Carrera S, featuring a pristine 3.8L flat-six powerplant with zero bore scoring and a documented IMS retrofit. This example boasts the optional PASM sport-tuned suspension and a precise 6-speed manual transaxle paired with a factory short-shift kit. Performance is optimized via a refurbished limited-slip differential and fresh Michelin Pilot Sport 4S rubber on lightweight alloys. The chassis remains rigid, free of subframe fatigue, and the naturally aspirated torque delivery is linear across the entire RPM band. Meticulously maintained with a full service dossier, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of analog driver engagement.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service history.

Presenting a truly exceptional find: a vehicle that looks and drives as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. The exterior boasts a mirror-like finish with deep luster and zero imperfections, having been preserved in a climate-controlled environment away from the elements. Inside, the cabin is absolutely immaculate; the premium upholstery remains supple and free of any creasing or wear, while every electronic component and switch functions with factory precision. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, featuring a comprehensive, document-heavy service history and a whisper-quiet engine that reflects its pampered life. From the pristine engine bay to the untouched trunk space, every detail has been meticulously scrutinized to ensure it meets the highest standards for a collector or a discerning enthusiast. This is more than just a pre-owned vehicle; it is a time capsule ready for its next caretaker.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This unit remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of meticulous care. Each component has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our exacting mechanical and aesthetic benchmarks. For the discerning buyer seeking a peerless driving experience, this offering represents the pinnacle of its class.
